strategic_objective: Determine whether near-constant bulk traffic feature values reflect genuine network saturation effects or artifacts of feature extraction under DDoS conditions.
key_checks: Analyze cardinality and value distribution of bulk features across classes and time
Investigate potential ceiling or saturation effects in bulk traffic measurements
Cross-check feature extraction methods for possible aggregation artifacts
success_criteria: Evidence supporting genuine network pattern versus extraction artifact
Bounded understanding of saturation effects on bulk feature diversity
Identification of stable versus unstable bulk feature behavior
router_constraints: preserve evidence references on feature cardinality and distribution
